name: alignment_bias_scm
description: Structural causal representation for alignment risk from objective mismatch and data bias.

nodes.label: Human Intent
nodes.description: Normative human goals and safety constraints.

nodes.label: Protected Attribute
nodes.description: Sensitive attribute that should not cause harmful disparity.

nodes.label: World State
nodes.description: External context affecting outcomes and data generation.

nodes.label: Objective Function
nodes.description: Formal objective used by optimization and policy.

nodes.label: Training Data
nodes.description: Historical records and measurements used for model training.

nodes.label: Model Parameters
nodes.description: Model state after optimization on data and objective.

nodes.label: Deployed Policy
nodes.description: Action policy that maps inputs to decisions.

alignment_formula.statement: ALIGN(A,H) <=> EXECUTES(A,O) and REPRESENTS(O,H) and not BIASED(D)

do_interventions.name: do_specification_upgrade
do_interventions.description: Constrain objective with explicit intent predicates and negative side constraints.

do_interventions.name: do_data_reweighting
do_interventions.description: Apply representation balancing and importance weighting across protected groups.

do_interventions.name: do_policy_constraint
do_interventions.description: Apply post-hoc fairness constraints and abstention thresholds on uncertain regions.
